productName: BFF Flavored Live Resin AIO - NO CAP - Neon Cherry Apricot - 1g - (I) - DOH
description: This hybrid disposable carries Neon Cherry Apricot in a ready-to-go pen with the battery built right in — grab it, hit it, recycle it when it's done. Zero setup, all flavor — a sweet, ripe cherry flavor, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
